name: delegate
description: Delegate a task to another agent in the mesh. The registry routes by skill or target agent ID. The task is queued and executed by the target agent.

message.description: The task description or prompt to send to the target agent

target_agent_id.description: The ID of the target agent. If omitted, routes by skill.

skill.description: The skill to invoke on the target agent. Used for routing if no target specified.

wait.description: Whether to wait for the result (blocking) or return immediately.
